package middleware

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
	"net/http"
)

// Positive scenario for middleware_starts_db_transaction.
// Rule intent: Middleware that opens database transactions for the whole request path by default.
type CaseMiddlewareStartsDbTransactionDTO struct {
	ID       string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
	TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
	Status   string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
	Amount   int    `json:"amount"`
	Payload  []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareStartsDbTransactionModel struct {
	ID       string         `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
	TenantID string         `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
	Status   string         `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
	DeletedAt sql.NullTime  `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareStartsDbTransactionRepository struct {
	db    *gorm.DB
	sqlDB *sql.DB
}

type CaseMiddlewareStartsDbTransactionService struct {
	repo *CaseMiddlewareStartsDbTransactionRepository
}

func (s *CaseMiddlewareStartsDbTransactionService) CreateWithTx(ctx context.Context, tx *gorm.DB, model *CaseMiddlewareStartsDbTransactionModel) error {
	return tx.Create(model).Error
}

func PositiveMiddlewareStartsDbTransaction(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB) error {
	repo := &CaseMiddlewareStartsDbTransactionRepository{db: db, sqlDB: sqlDB}
	svc := &CaseMiddlewareStartsDbTransactionService{repo: repo}

	middleware := func(next gin.HandlerFunc) gin.HandlerFunc {
		return func(c *gin.Context) {
			tx := db.Begin()
			defer func() {
				if r := recover(); r != nil {
					tx.Rollback()
				}
			}()

			c.Set("db_tx", tx)

			next(c)

			if c.Writer.Status() >= 400 {
				tx.Rollback()
			} else {
				tx.Commit()
			}
		}
	}

	handler := func(c *gin.Context) {
		tx := c.MustGet("db_tx").(*gorm.DB)
		model := &CaseMiddlewareStartsDbTransactionModel{
			ID:       c.Param("id"),
			TenantID: c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID"),
			Status:   "pending",
		}
		svc.CreateWithTx(ctx, tx, model)
		c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, gin.H{"id": model.ID, "status": model.Status})
	}

	middleware(handler)(c)
	return nil
}
